title: Crunchy Croatian Potato Bake
description: A light and crunchy Croatian dish featuring potatoes, salt-bake, and a hint of wine, made in a comal for a delicious and anti-inflammatory friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder until they are evenly coated.
Arrange the potatoes in a single layer on the preheated comal.
Roast the potatoes in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Remove the comal from the oven and brush the potatoes with red wine.
Return the comal to the oven and continue to roast for an additional 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
Remove the comal from the oven and sprinkle the chopped rosemary and shredded grana padano cheese over the potatoes.
Return the comal to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
